declarations.description: Adds compact leading or trailing supporting content to an input control.
declarations.name: MuiAddon

attributes.name: slot
attributes.description: Places the add on before or after content when used within `mui-input`.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the add on size, normally aligned to the owning input size.

slots.description: Text, icon or compact supporting content.

cssProperties.name: --addon-background
cssProperties.description: Background color applied to the add on surface.

declarations.description: Surfaces task-related feedback with an intent icon, message content and optional action.
declarations.name: MuiAlert

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Feedback intent. `success` normalises to `positive`; `error` normalises to `attention`.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Overrides the intent prefix label.

attributes.name: hide-label
attributes.description: Hides the visible intent prefix label.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Alert density and coordinated icon/action size.

slots.description: Alert message content, including optional inline links.

slots.name: action
slots.description: Optional `mui-button` or `mui-link` action aligned and sized for the alert.

cssProperties.name: --alert-radius
cssProperties.description: Alert surface corner radius.

cssProperties.name: --alert-padding-small
cssProperties.description: Surface padding for small alerts.

cssProperties.name: --alert-padding-medium
cssProperties.description: Surface padding for medium alerts.

cssProperties.name: --alert-padding-large
cssProperties.description: Surface padding for large alerts.

declarations.default: { AvatarChip: { title: "Avatar Chip", description: "Avatar Chip composes an avatar with compact primary and secondary identity text for creator, author, or profile references.", hero: [""], figma: [""], storybook: [""], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/blob/main/src/components/mui-avatar-chip/index.ts"], website: ["https://muibook.com/avatar-chip"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/avatar-chip"], usage: { list: [ "Use Avatar Chip when an avatar and two compact text lines need to travel as one profile identity pattern.", "Use `primary` and `secondary` for simple text labels.", "Use `slot='primary'` or `slot='secondary'` when the copy needs custom typography, links, badges, or supporting icons.", "When Avatar Chip is slotted into Media Player metadata, Media Player applies `usage='media-player'` automatically.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: [""], engineerList: ["Provide a meaningful `label` so avatar initials and linked avatar actions have useful accessible names."], }, related: { items: [ { name: "Avatar", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/avatar" }, { name: "Media Player", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/media-player" }, ], }, }, }

declarations.description: Composes an avatar, primary label, and secondary label into a compact profile identity pattern for media metadata, creator rows, and compact profile references.
declarations.name: MuiAvatarChip

attributes.name: primary
attributes.description: Fallback primary label when slot='primary' is not provided.

attributes.name: secondary
attributes.description: Fallback secondary label when slot='secondary' is not provided.

attributes.name: image
attributes.description: Avatar image URL. Uses initials from label when omitted.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible avatar label and initials source.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Optional profile URL. When provided, the avatar is rendered as a link.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Anchor browsing context for the avatar link.

attributes.name: usage
attributes.description: Media Player applies media-player automatically when the chip is slotted into metadata; set manually only for non-Media Player previews that need the same treatment.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Avatar chip scale. Controls the internal avatar size and primary and secondary text sizes.

slots.name: primary
slots.description: Optional custom primary content when richer typography or inline composition is needed.

slots.name: secondary
slots.description: Optional custom secondary content, such as a link, count, badge, or icon.

cssProperties.name: --avatar-chip-text-color
cssProperties.description: Text color used by primary and secondary labels.

cssProperties.name: --avatar-chip-secondary-color
cssProperties.description: Secondary text color used by secondary labels.

cssProperties.name: --avatar-chip-link-color
cssProperties.description: Default link color used inside the avatar chip.

cssProperties.name: --avatar-chip-avatar-border
cssProperties.description: Border applied to the internal avatar.

cssProperties.name: --avatar-chip-avatar-shadow
cssProperties.description: Shadow applied to the internal avatar.

declarations.description: Displays an image, initials, or slotted icon for a represented person or entity.
declarations.name: MuiAvatar

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible name and initials source when no image or slotted content is present.

attributes.name: image
attributes.description: Image URL used when no slotted content is supplied.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Avatar dimensions. Defaults map `xx-small` to 24px and `x-small` to 32px.

attributes.name: background
attributes.description: Named semantic or profile color background.

attributes.name: background-color
attributes.description: Custom CSS color overriding the named background treatment.

slots.description: Optional icon or custom visible avatar content.

cssProperties.name: --avatar-xx-small
cssProperties.description: Dimension for `size="xx-small"`; defaults to 24px.

cssProperties.name: --avatar-x-small
cssProperties.description: Dimension for `size="x-small"`; defaults to 32px.

cssProperties.name: --avatar-background-override
cssProperties.description: Overrides the resolved avatar background color.

cssProperties.name: --avatar-icon-color
cssProperties.description: Controls the fill color of slotted icon content inside the avatar. Falls back to currentColor.

declarations.description: Displays compact, non-interactive presentational labels, counts, or lightweight metadata. Use for labels such as Offline, Online, Busy, Do not disturb, Beta, Default, IMG, or Shared when they support the surrounding UI rather than acting as the primary state field for a record.
declarations.name: MuiBadge

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Sets the badge intent style for lightweight non-interactive metadata. Use Status when the value is the primary state of an object, record, workflow, or system.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the badge scale so it can sit inside cards, messages, nav, controls, and other presentational surfaces.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Overrides the badge background only. Accepts a named categorical colour or a custom CSS background value.

attributes.name: usage
attributes.description: Applies layout-specific styling for supported parent patterns.

slots.description: Badge text content.

cssProperties.name: --badge-radius
cssProperties.description: Controls the badge corner radius.

cssProperties.name: --badge-font-weight
cssProperties.description: Controls the badge text weight.

cssProperties.name: --badge-background
cssProperties.description: Overrides the badge background when no color attribute is set.

cssProperties.name: --badge-background-[color]
cssProperties.description: Named standalone badge backgrounds used by color='grey|purple|violet|pink|magenta|red|orange|amber|yellow|lime|green|teal|cyan|blue|indigo'.

declarations.description: Renders body text with semantic size, weight and feedback color treatments.
declarations.name: MuiBody

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Sets the body text size.

attributes.name: weight
attributes.description: Sets the body text weight.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Sets the semantic text color treatment.

attributes.name: truncate
attributes.description: Clamps body text to a single line with ellipsis when the available width is constrained.

attributes.name: clamp
attributes.description: Limits body text to the provided number of lines. Ignored when truncate is present.

slots.description: Body text content.

slots.name: before
slots.description: Leading icon or badge, automatically aligned to the text size.

slots.name: after
slots.description: Trailing icon or badge, automatically aligned to the text size.

cssProperties.name: --body-inline-icon-offset
cssProperties.description: Shared vertical alignment offset for slotted inline icons.

cssProperties.name: --body-inline-icon-offset-x-small
cssProperties.description: Vertical alignment offset for icons in x-small text.

cssProperties.name: --body-inline-icon-offset-small
cssProperties.description: Vertical alignment offset for icons in small text.

cssProperties.name: --body-inline-icon-offset-medium
cssProperties.description: Vertical alignment offset for icons in medium text.

cssProperties.name: --body-inline-icon-offset-large
cssProperties.description: Vertical alignment offset for icons in large text.

attributes.description: Button scale; also controls automatic icon, avatar, and badge sizing.

attributes.name: usage

declarations.description: Displays supplementary content as an overlay, push layout, persistent adjacent panel, or workspace shell.
declarations.name: MuiDrawer

members.name: open
members.description: Opens the drawer and dispatches `mui-drawer-open`.

members.name: close
members.description: Closes the drawer and dispatches `mui-drawer-close`.

events.name: mui-drawer-open
events.description: Dispatched by `open()` when the drawer opens.

events.name: mui-drawer-close
events.description: Dispatched by `close()` when the drawer closes.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Controls drawer visibility.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Drawer width. Accepts any valid CSS width value.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Drawer layout height. Accepts any valid CSS height value and is useful for contained story, demo, or app regions.

attributes.name: side
attributes.description: Side from which the drawer is displayed.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Layout behaviour: modal overlay, collapsible adjacent page layout, persistent adjacent layout, or workspace shell with left and right panels.

attributes.name: left-open
attributes.description: Displays the left panel when variant='workspace'.

attributes.name: right-open
attributes.description: Displays the right panel when variant='workspace'.

attributes.name: left-width
attributes.description: Left panel width when variant='workspace'. Accepts any valid CSS width value.

attributes.name: right-width
attributes.description: Right panel width when variant='workspace'. Accepts any valid CSS width value.

attributes.name: z-index
attributes.description: Overlay stacking value; the drawer surface is rendered one level above it.

attributes.name: drawer-space
attributes.description: Removes default padding from the drawer content region when present.

attributes.name: close-size
attributes.description: Sets the built-in header close action size.

attributes.name: breakpoint
attributes.description: Pixel breakpoint where push, persistent or workspace layouts switch to their narrow-screen presentation.

attributes.name: mobile-presentation
attributes.description: Narrow-screen presentation for persistent drawers. Overlay keeps the page visible behind a modal side drawer; stack keeps the previous block layout for custom mobile compositions.

attributes.name: resize-rail
attributes.description: Adds opt-in desktop resize rails. Push and persistent drawers get a rail between drawer and page; workspace drawers get independent left and right rails. Dragging updates the relevant width while clamping to a minimum drawer width and preserving page space. Focused rails can be nudged with ArrowLeft/ArrowRight, or Shift plus arrow keys for larger steps; when keyboard resizing reaches the minimum width, the rail shows an ESC affordance for closing.

attributes.name: resize-min-drawer-width
attributes.description: Minimum drawer width in pixels when resize-rail is enabled.

attributes.name: resize-min-left-width
attributes.description: Minimum left panel width in pixels when resize-rail is enabled on variant='workspace'. Overrides resize-min-drawer-width for the left panel only.

attributes.name: resize-min-right-width
attributes.description: Minimum right panel width in pixels when resize-rail is enabled on variant='workspace'. Overrides resize-min-drawer-width for the right panel only.

attributes.name: resize-min-page-width
attributes.description: Minimum page width in pixels preserved while resize-rail is enabled.

attributes.name: resize-close-threshold
attributes.description: Close threshold in pixels for resizable push and workspace drawers. Dragging below resize-min-drawer-width keeps visible width clamped; releasing below this value closes the drawer or workspace side.

contextualAttributes.name: data-close
contextualAttributes.description: Marker applied to a slotted action; integration code uses it to call the owning drawer's `close()` method.

slots.description: Primary scrollable drawer content.

slots.name: title
slots.description: Header title content. Providing it reveals the drawer header.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Footer action content. Providing it reveals the fixed footer region.

slots.name: page
slots.description: Page region displayed alongside `push`, `persistent`, and `workspace` variants. Use a plain `div` as the direct slotted wrapper, then compose Stack or other layout components inside it.

slots.name: left
slots.description: Left workspace panel content when variant='workspace'.

slots.name: right
slots.description: Right workspace panel content when variant='workspace'.

cssProperties.name: --drawer-background
cssProperties.description: Drawer surface and footer background.

cssProperties.name: --drawer-height
cssProperties.description: Drawer layout height shared by the host, shell, page, and mobile overlay panels. Set through the `height` attribute or directly in CSS.

cssProperties.name: --drawer-resize-rail-size
cssProperties.description: Width of the resize rail when resize-rail is enabled.

cssProperties.name: --drawer-resize-rail-threshold-indicator
cssProperties.description: Resize rail indicator color when a resizable push or workspace drawer is dragged into the close threshold.

events.name: dropdown-toggle

attributes.name: zindex

attributes.name: position

attributes.name: vertical-position

slots.name: action

Menu contents, typically `mui-button` options and separating rules.

events.description: Dispatched during value entry with `detail.value`.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Native input data type.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current input value.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Hint displayed when no value is entered.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Input identifier used to associate the visible label.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible input label. Required for labelled form usage.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables input interaction.

attributes.name: hide-label
attributes.description: Visually hides the supplied label while preserving it as the accessible name.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual validation state.

attributes.name: optional
attributes.description: Displays an optional marker beside the label.

attributes.name: max-length
attributes.description: Maximum character length. Providing it displays a live count.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Input and slotted affordance size scale.

attributes.name: slot-layout
attributes.description: Arranges external before and after slots inline or stacked around the input.

slots.name: before
slots.description: Flush leading control, such as `mui-addon`, `mui-select`, `mui-button` or `mui-chip`.

slots.name: after
slots.description: Flush trailing control, such as `mui-addon`, `mui-select`, `mui-button` or `mui-chip`.

slots.name: inside-before
slots.description: Leading content displayed inside the input edge, such as an icon or badge.

slots.name: inside-after
slots.description: Trailing content displayed inside the input edge, such as an icon or badge.

slots.name: hint
slots.description: Contextual hint content displayed inside the trailing input affordance area.

cssProperties.description: Maximum width for leading external slot content.

cssProperties.name: --input-after-slot-max-width
cssProperties.description: Maximum width for trailing external slot content.

cssProperties.name: --input-slot-wrap
cssProperties.description: Wrapping behaviour for external slot content.

cssProperties.name: --input-slot-overflow-x
cssProperties.description: Horizontal overflow behaviour for external slot content.

declarations.description: Provides anchor navigation as an inline link or action-styled link with optional supporting content.
declarations.name: MuiLink

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Anchor browsing context, such as `_self` or `_blank`.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Navigation destination URL.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Uses standard inline-link styling or an action-style treatment.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables navigation and exposes the anchor as aria-disabled.

attributes.name: weight
attributes.description: Font weight of link content.

attributes.name: stroke
attributes.description: Controls whether action-style link strokes are drawn with the normal border or an inset ring shadow.

attributes.name: stroke-ring-size
attributes.description: Ring stroke width when `stroke="ring"` is used on action-style links. Token values map to `--stroke-size-*`.

attributes.name: focus-ring
attributes.description: Controls focus outline placement. The default is inset; use `outset` only when the focus ring should sit outside the action.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Link scale; also controls automatic icon, avatar, and badge sizing.

attributes.name: download
attributes.description: Downloads the linked resource; provide a value to set a download filename.

attributes.name: usage
attributes.description: Uses field-compatible styling when the link is slotted before or after an input.

slots.description: Link label or a single icon for an icon-only link action.

slots.name: before
slots.description: Leading icon, avatar, badge, or other supporting content.

slots.name: after
slots.description: Trailing icon, avatar, badge, or other supporting content.

cssProperties.name: --action-focus-outline
cssProperties.description: Controls the link focus-visible outline. Defaults to stroke-size-400.

cssProperties.name: --action-focus-outline-offset
cssProperties.description: Controls the link focus-visible outline offset. Defaults to an inset stroke-size-400 offset.

cssProperties.name: --action-focus-outline-inset-offset
cssProperties.description: Controls the default inset focus outline offset. Defaults to stroke-size-400.

cssProperties.name: --action-focus-outline-outset-offset
cssProperties.description: Controls the positive outline offset when `focus-ring="outset"` is used. Defaults to stroke-size-200.

cssProperties.name: --link-focus-radius
cssProperties.description: Controls the default inline link focus outline radius. Defaults to radius-200.

declarations.description: Renders native or embedded audio and video media from a supplied source, with optional Muibook controls for direct media files and composable metadata for titles, avatars, links, badges, and product actions.
declarations.name: MuiMediaPlayer

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Media URL to render.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Overrides media type detection for the source URL.

attributes.name: autoplay
attributes.description: Opt-in setting that requests automatic playback when allowed by the browser. Avoid enabling by default unless the experience clearly requires it.

attributes.name: muted
attributes.description: Starts native media muted.

attributes.name: loop
attributes.description: Restarts playback when media ends.

attributes.name: poster
attributes.description: Poster image URL for native video media.

attributes.name: artwork
attributes.description: Optional artwork image URL for audio artwork presentation.

attributes.name: media-title
attributes.description: Fallback title displayed in audio presentations or video metadata when slot='meta-before' is not provided.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Sets the audio metadata or artwork presentation height using any valid CSS height value. Maps to --media-player-audio-height.

attributes.name: center-play
attributes.description: Displays an always-visible centered play/pause action over native video.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Forces the centered loading affordance for externally managed loading states, demos, or diagnostics.

attributes.name: controls
attributes.description: Chooses whether Muibook controls are rendered over the native media element.

attributes.name: waveform
attributes.description: Opt-in generated waveform for audio presentations. The component fetches and decodes the source when possible; remote sources may not render a waveform if CORS blocks decoding.

slots.name: meta-before
slots.description: Optional composed top-left metadata content for audio presentations and video metadata. Use it for avatar, title, supporting copy, links, or badges. Overrides the media-title fallback layout.

slots.name: meta-after
slots.description: Optional composed top-right metadata content for actions, links, badges, or supporting controls. The space between meta-before and meta-after remains available for media playback interaction.

declarations.description: Presents a persistent page-level notification with an intent icon, heading, and slotted supporting body content. Use Form Message for form guidance and Body with an info icon for lightweight inline notes.
declarations.name: MuiMessage

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Sets the page-level intent style and default icon. Reserve positive, warning, and attention for meaningful status or severity, not routine inline emphasis.

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Sets the concise message title. Do not put full body copy here; supporting content belongs in the default slot.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Overrides the default variant icon with a `mui-icon-*` tag name.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the message density and typography scale.

slots.description: Required supporting content below the heading. Use `mui-body`, `mui-list`, `mui-link`, or related content; avoid leaving the slot empty.

cssProperties.name: --message-padding
cssProperties.description: Controls the message inset spacing.

cssProperties.name: --message-gap-horizontal
cssProperties.description: Controls horizontal spacing between icon and content.

cssProperties.name: --message-gap-vertical
cssProperties.description: Controls vertical spacing between stacked content rows.

cssProperties.name: --message-radius
cssProperties.description: Controls the message corner radius.

declarations.default: { Prompt: { title: "Prompt", description: "Prompt provides a reusable prompt surface with floating actions and Enter-to-submit behavior.", hero: [""], figma: ["https://www.figma.com/design/l0mt1lXu97XoHJCEdnrWLp/Mui-Design-System?node-id=2117-17601&t=P2Vr2JDCBlI425XD-1"], storybook: ["https://stories.muibook.com/?path=/docs/ai-llm-prompt--docs"], github: ["https://github.com/michaeltrilford/muibook/tree/main/src/components/mui-prompt"], website: ["https://muibook.com/prompt"], guides: ["https://guides.muibook.com/prompt"], usage: { list: [ "Use for AI/chat prompt entry surfaces with action controls.", "In Muibook stories, use the Interactive Prompt story at the top of the page as the primary end-to-end reference (paste/upload/context/submit).", "This component is extracted from composition patterns to standardize prompt behavior across experiences.", "Keep prompt as a controlled input in app state: write value via attribute/property and sync from input events.", "Use Enter submit for fast send flows; keep Shift+Enter for multiline authoring.", "Press Enter to submit and Shift+Enter to add a newline.", "Set enter-submit='false' to disable Enter submit behavior.", "Use slot='actions' for utility actions (attach, source, tools).", "Prompt includes a default submit control in actions-right; override by slotting your own actions-right control when needed.", "All utility actions are intended to be slotted so product teams can wire behavior from app state.", "A default fan trigger is included out-of-the-box for action fan behavior.", "Use slot='actions-right' when you need a custom submit/toggle action instead of the default.", "Prompt no longer renders a built-in action divider; slot your own <mui-rule slot='actions'> when needed (for example with inline margin style).", "Set loading to show built-in async feedback spinner beside actions-right while requests are in flight.", "Use loading-label to provide accessible status text for the spinner.", "Fan behavior derives from slotted actions by default; use fan-open when you want the fan open by default.", "fan-open normalizes fan behavior in composed trees by enabling fan mode when needed.", "Use context-mode='icon|chip' with slotted <mui-prompt-toggle> for app-driven context state.", "Fan spread, speed, and amplitude are fixed to system defaults; tune through component tokens/CSS where needed.", "Built-in preview dialog handling is enabled for prompt-preview-open events.", "Set preview-threshold-chars to control when pasted text is converted into preview attachments.", "Set preview-overflow-to-preview='false' to always paste text directly into the textarea.", "When internal preview dialog handling is enabled, slotted prompt previews are auto-clickable by default.", "Set preview-auto-clickable='false' to keep previews non-clickable unless explicitly configured.", "Set preview-loading to force slotted previews into loading state while async metadata resolves.", "Set preview-loading='auto' to mirror prompt loading state onto slotted previews.", "Use preview-loading-label to provide accessible loading text for preview spinners.", "Use error-message for direct prompt-level error feedback rendered below the input.", "Set debug to render built-in submit debug telemetry (status + JSON payload) below the prompt.", "Use slot='error' to render fully custom error content when product needs bespoke treatment.", "Use setError(message) and clearError() for app-driven validation and transport error handling.", "Use prompt-paste to ingest user clipboard payloads and convert them into prompt-preview items.", "Use prompt-preview-open to react to preview activation and update app-level analytics/state.", "For native media previews, use direct .mp4/.mp3 values so the built-in dialog opens with native media controls.", "Prefer system/semantic tokens for color-top-* values when theming prompt color surfaces.", "For React wrappers, map CustomEvent handlers to props (onSubmit, onPromptPaste, onPromptPreviewOpen, onEscape).", "Mark the trigger action with fan-trigger; if omitted, the first action is used.", "Prefer this component instead of ad hoc prompt wrappers when the same interaction model is needed.", ], }, accessibility: { designerList: [ "Provide clear prompt intent through nearby heading/body context; placeholder alone should not carry all instruction.", "Ensure action icons are understandable and consistently positioned (utility actions left, submit/state action right).", "Keep status text low-emphasis visually, but persistent enough to communicate send state changes.", ], engineerList: [ "Support keyboard parity: Enter submits, Shift+Enter adds newline.", "If showing send status, use an aria-live region so updates are announced to assistive tech.", "Do not trap focus; users must be able to tab into and out of the prompt and actions naturally.", "Ensure a clear placeholder or label context for prompt intent.", "Provide aria-label values for icon-only action buttons slotted into actions.", "When authoring themes, rely on public --prompt-* tokens and attributes rather than internal prompt CSS variables.", ], }, anatomy: { image: "", list: ["Prompt surface", "Input area", "Action slot"] }, variants: { items: [{ key: "", title: "", description: "", image: "" }] }, compositions: { description: "", items: [] }, related: { items: [ { name: "Input", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/input" }, { name: "Button", link: "https://guides.muibook.com/button" }, ], }, rules: [ { heading: "Pattern Rule", description: "Use Prompt as the shared prompt-surface primitive; keep product-specific flows in compositions.", doContent: [ { description: "Reuse this component when Enter submit + floating actions are expected.", image: "" }, ], dontContent: [ { description: "Do not rebuild the prompt shell in each composition with custom wrappers.", image: "" }, ], }, ], behaviour: { list: [ "Enter emits a submit event with current value.", "Shift+Enter inserts a newline.", "Pasting emits prompt-paste with detected payload metadata for consumers to store and render previews.", "Short text paste remains in the textarea; long text and binary paste can be converted to preview items based on threshold settings.", "Clicking a preview emits prompt-preview-open with normalized preview payload (badge, value, image metadata).", "Escape emits escape and closes fan actions when open.", "Error feedback supports dismiss and optional expand/collapse for long copy.", "Clicking content inside a slotted <mui-prompt-toggle> emits prompt-context-change and switches to context chip mode.", "Dismissing content marked with [context-chip] emits prompt-context-dismiss and returns to icon mode.", "Actions remain anchored at the prompt edge while text grows.", "Action behavior should be equivalent whether triggered by keyboard submit or click.", "When loading is set, prompt shows async spinner feedback near submit and blocks additional submits.", ], }, writing: { list: ["Use clear placeholder prompts that describe expected user input."], }, }, }

declarations.description: Provides a rich prompt composer with actions, previews, loading, and feedback states.
declarations.name: MuiPrompt

members.name: value
members.description: Gets or sets the current prompt text.

members.name: errorMessage
members.description: Gets or sets the current error message.

members.name: submit
members.description: Requests submission of the current prompt value.

members.name: clear
members.description: Clears the prompt value and related visible state.

members.name: setError
members.description: Sets an error message for the prompt.

members.name: clearError
members.description: Clears the current prompt error message.

members.name: focus
members.description: Moves focus to the prompt text input.

events.name: prompt-paste
events.description: Dispatched when pasted or uploaded content is converted into prompt preview data.

events.name: prompt-context-change
events.description: Dispatched when prompt context is changed.

events.name: prompt-context-dismiss
events.description: Dispatched when prompt context is dismissed.

events.name: before-submit
events.description: Cancelable event dispatched before submission; prevent it to block submission.

events.name: submit
events.description: Dispatched after an accepted submit request with value and source details.

events.name: input
events.description: Dispatched when the prompt value is changed.

events.name: prompt-error-set
events.description: Dispatched when an error message is set programmatically.

events.name: prompt-error-clear
events.description: Dispatched when an existing error message is cleared.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Textarea placeholder.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Initial prompt value.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables prompt input.

attributes.name: rows
attributes.description: Controls the growth range and cap while retaining the default prompt baseline height.

attributes.name: enter-submit
attributes.description: Submits when Enter is pressed; Shift+Enter inserts a new line.

attributes.name: actions-fan
attributes.description: Explicitly enables fan-mode actions; this is otherwise derived from slotted actions.

attributes.name: fan-open
attributes.description: Opens fan actions by default.

attributes.name: preview-overflow-to-preview
attributes.description: Converts sufficiently long pasted text into preview items instead of inserting it into the textarea.

attributes.name: preview-scrollbar
attributes.description: Hides scrollbar chrome while retaining horizontal preview scrolling.

attributes.name: preview-threshold-chars
attributes.description: Character threshold at which pasted text becomes a preview item.

attributes.name: preview-auto-clickable
attributes.description: Automatically enables activation behaviour on slotted previews.

attributes.name: preview-loading
attributes.description: Applies loading state to slotted previews; `auto` mirrors the prompt loading state.

attributes.name: preview-loading-label
attributes.description: Accessible loading label passed to slotted previews.

attributes.name: preview-dialog-width
attributes.description: Width used by the internal preview dialog.

attributes.name: preview-dialog-title
attributes.description: Fallback title used by the internal preview dialog.

attributes.name: preview-dialog-bordered
attributes.description: Applies `var(--border-thin)` to the internal preview dialog.

attributes.name: context-mode
attributes.description: Controls which content inside `mui-prompt-toggle` is visible.

attributes.name: effects-off
attributes.description: Disables prompt hover and focus visual effects.

attributes.name: color-layout
attributes.description: Selects the mapping of top mesh color positions.

attributes.name: color-top-start
attributes.description: Optional CSS color override for the top mesh starting color.

attributes.name: color-top-mid
attributes.description: Optional CSS color override for the top mesh middle color.

attributes.name: color-top-end
attributes.description: Optional CSS color override for the top mesh ending color.

attributes.name: color-top-accent
attributes.description: Optional CSS color override for the top mesh accent color.

attributes.name: error-message
attributes.description: Error content rendered beneath the prompt.

attributes.name: debug
attributes.description: Renders built-in status and payload output for diagnostics.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Displays built-in loading feedback and prevents submission while active.

attributes.name: loading-label
attributes.description: Accessible label used by the built-in loading spinner.

attributes.name: --prompt-preview-dialog-border

slots.description: Optional replacement content for the built-in textarea region.

attributes.description: Hides header chrome.

attributes.name: hide-footer
attributes.description: Hides footer chrome.

attributes.name: scroll
attributes.description: Allows slide surface overflow to scroll.

declarations.description: Captures one selection from a supplied option list with label and validation styling.
declarations.name: MuiSelect

events.name: change
events.description: Dispatched when the selected option changes with `detail.value`.

events.name: input
events.description: Dispatched during selection updates with `detail.value`.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value of the selected option.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Select identifier used to associate the visible label.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible select label.

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: JSON-encoded array of options, each containing `value` and `label`.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables selection interaction.

attributes.name: hide-label
attributes.description: Visually hides the supplied label while preserving it as the accessible name.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual validation state.

attributes.name: optional
attributes.description: Displays an optional marker beside the label.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Select size scale.

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description: Controls the select rendering model. Use `custom` for the experimental native customizable select appearance with rich option content.

attributes.name: selected-content
attributes.description: Controls how custom appearance renders the closed selected value. Use `label` when rich picker options should collapse to plain option text in the trigger.

attributes.name: col
attributes.description: Custom appearance picker grid columns. The custom picker uses grid layout by default, so `col` maps to `grid-template-columns`.

attributes.name: space
attributes.description: Custom appearance picker gap between options.

attributes.name: max-height
attributes.description: Optional max height for the custom appearance picker before it scrolls.

attributes.name: padding-block
attributes.description: Custom appearance trigger and option vertical padding. Accepts one or two CSS padding values.

attributes.name: padding-inline
attributes.description: Custom appearance trigger and option horizontal padding. Accepts one or two CSS padding values.

attributes.description: Applies a standalone categorical status colour. Use when the status needs a non-semantic category colour rather than feedback intent.

attributes.name: action
attributes.description: Makes the status interactive by applying button semantics, keyboard activation, pointer cursor, and focus styling.

slots.name: after
